title: legazpia mucronulata
side_effects: Legazpia mucronulata can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea and vomiting, as well as diarrhea. It may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, particularly in individuals with sensitive skin. In severe cases, improper use of Legazpia mucronulata may lead to cardiovascular issues, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, excessive consumption may result in liver damage and other organ toxicity issues.
